package.name: mycobot_driver
package.description: Real-robot driver for the myCobot 280 Pi. A WSL2-side ROS 2 node bridges MoveIt2 to the physical arm: it serves the FollowJointTrajectory action and publishes /joint_states, talking over a simple ASCII TCP protocol to mycobot_tcp_bridge.py running on the robot's Raspberry Pi. Replaces the ros2_control hardware interface for the real robot (no controller_manager, no cross-distro DDS).
